title: gymnocarpium obtusifolium
intro: Gymnocarpium obtusifolium, also known as the ostrich fern or leather fern, is a species of fern that is native to North America and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Gymnocarpium obtusifolium are thought to include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as having antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, and it is often used in traditional herbal remedies to treat a range of conditions, including colds, fever, and skin irritations.
